training_and_development_head.name: Bethany Tate Cornell
training_and_development_head.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Learning and Development Officer

value: Business Facilities Lease (BFL; 3-yr with conditional purchase option)

development_structure.value: Single-unit franchises only at site selected and developed by McDonald's; no exclusive territory; franchisee has no right to acquire additional units (Item 17 Note 3, Growth Policy in Exhibit L).

bfl.value: $45,000 paid only on exercise of conditional purchase option

refund_terms.value: Full refund only if construction not completed within 1 year of FA signing; otherwise no refund

contradictions: Item 7 Note 11: 9 of 31 2024 McOpCo refranchise transactions exceeded the high end of disclosed range, by amounts up to $2,035,816

royalty.value: 5% of Gross Sales (post-Jan 1 2024 new restaurants, McOpCo purchases, post-ROFR re-sales) or 4% (legacy: family transactions, new term agreements on existing restaurants, franchisee-to-franchisee sales of existing restaurants, rebuilds)

advertising.value: Not less than 4% of Gross Sales spent during each calendar year; OPNAD national fund currently 2.25% of sales; local cooperatives variable

rent.value: Hybrid: Monthly Base Rent + Pass-Thru Rent + Percentage Rent. New traditional Percentage Rent generally 6%–23% of Gross Sales; minimum 11.50% from year 8. STO/STR per tiered table 9.0%–11.50% by acquisition+development cost. MIW Satellite 14%–15.5% Fixed Percentage Rent. Effective rent in 2024 ranged 0.00%–33.33%.

technology_fees_total_annual_estimate.value: ≈$10,500–$11,500/year per restaurant from itemized Item 6 tech fees (sum of Sesame, Global Mobile App, McDelivery, kiosk, eProduction, Back Office, Payments and Fraud Mgmt, Employee Engagement, PDW, McD Connect, REES, Deployment/OTP/Support, Network Mgmt, Restaurant Hardware, RFM, Microsoft, Pricing Engine, GRNT, Edge, Store Mail; plus several thousand in one-time deployment fees)

rebates_and_incentives_received_by_franc.value: $39,008,767 in loan guarantee service fees, cashless incentives, and beverage supplier rebates

real_estate_revenue_share_of_franchisor_.value: Real estate and services to franchisees represented about 68% of franchisor 2024 total revenue ($7.21B / $10.63B)

program.value: Candidate Development Program — Hamburger University (Chicago) + field offices, generally 6 months to 2 years to complete

minimum_classroom_hours.value: ≈243 classroom hours (sum of named subjects with classroom hours, including 32-hour 4-day Leading Great Restaurants Class at HU)

compensation_during_training.value: None — candidate is unpaid and not a McDonald's employee

store_systems_capex.value: $150,000 to $250,000 (POS, Cashless, indoor and outdoor digital menu boards, kiosks, table locators, hardware, software)

data_access.value: POS-level transaction data transmitted to and held on McDonald's servers; McDonald's has independent access with no contractual limits

territory_structure.value: No exclusive territory, no protected area, no rights to exclude. McDonald's reserves the right to develop other restaurants, sell McCafé in retail and via e-commerce, and use Marks in any other channel of distribution.

term_bfl.value: 3 years (generally), extendable to up to 20 years on conditional purchase option exercise

renewal.value: No contractual right to renew or extend; new term governed only by McDonald's discretionary New Term Policy (Exhibit K)

transfer.value: Requires McDonald's prior written consent; royalty resets to current rate (5%); transferring franchisee remains personally liable; no current breach allowed; McDonald's holds right of first refusal

termination_with_cause.value: McDonald's may terminate for material breaches including: failure to maintain restaurant; bankruptcy; unpaid amount over 30 days; unsatisfied $5,000+ judgment over 30 days; loss of right of possession; violation of restrictions; sale of unauthorized food; transfer without consent; intentional under-reporting of Gross Sales; conduct damaging McDonald's reputation; conviction of felony; repeated other breaches

in_term.value: Yes — no involvement in competing or similar business (FA Sec 11)

post_term.value: 18 months, 10 miles from any McDonald's location, applies after assignment or sale (FA Sec 11)

state_modifications: North Dakota: non-compete generally unenforceable; McDonald's will seek to enforce only to the extent enforceable (Exhibit T p385)

pending_count.value: 7 pending federal cases + 1 collection action (Pestonjee, Sri Lanka)
pending_count.notes: Convention normalized per 17_conflict_adjudication.md — 7 federal cases (Deslandes, Turner, Crawford/McPherson, Kytch, Michell, Williams, Le) plus 1 international collection action (Pestonjee Sri Lanka)

concluded_cases.caption: Tavarua Restaurants v. McDonald's USA, LLC
AA&S Food Service Corp. v. McDonald's Corporation
concluded_cases.court: PR Court of First Instance, San Juan

concluded_cases.caption: Quijano v. McDonald's USA, LLC
concluded_cases.court: PR Court of First Instance, Arecibo

concluded_cases.caption: Bramante v. Les Restaurants McDonald du Canada
concluded_cases.claim_type: Quebec Consumer Protection Act / Happy Meal toys

concluded_cases.caption: Pandya / Il Ristorante del Centro v. McDonald's Development Italy
concluded_cases.claim_type: abuse of dominant position / economic dependence
concluded_cases.settlement_form: purchase of restaurant by McDonald's affiliate (€1,671,680 gross less €910,272 fees offset)

concluded_cases.caption: Snow Estate v. McDonald's Corporation
concluded_cases.settlement_form: cash + artwork removal in UK restaurant

concluded_cases.caption: Howe v. McDonald's Corporation
concluded_cases.claim_type: CA Mozzarella Cheese Sticks false advertising

concluded_cases.caption: Bledsoe v. McDonald's USA, LLC
concluded_cases.claim_type: drink upcharge in extra value meal

concluded_cases.caption: Abt v. McDonald's Corp.
concluded_cases.claim_type: fraud re McDonald's Channel in-store TV test

concluded_cases.caption: In the Matter of Stephen J. Easterbrook and McDonald's Corporation
concluded_cases.claim_type: proxy disclosure violations re former CEO separation
concluded_cases.settlement_form: cease-and-desist; no monetary penalty (SEC recognized substantial cooperation)

concluded_cases.caption: Clark / McDowell / Collora v. McDonald's Corporation (PFAS)
concluded_cases.claim_type: PFAS in food packaging consumer fraud

concluded_cases.caption: Gohari v. McDonald's Corporation
concluded_cases.court: Cook County Cir. Ct., Chancery Div.
concluded_cases.claim_type: Digital Menu Board pricing / Illinois consumer fraud

concluded_cases.caption: Zhuang Zhi-Xun v. McDonald's Restaurants (Taiwan)
concluded_cases.claim_type: Taiwan Fair Trade Commission franchisor disclosure
concluded_cases.settlement_form: termination of franchises + asset sale to McDonald's affiliate

pending_cases.caption: Deslandes v. McDonald's USA, LLC and McDonald's Corporation
pending_cases.type: no-poach class action (Sherman Act, Illinois antitrust)
pending_cases.status: remanded by 7th Cir.; back at district court

pending_cases.caption: Turner v. McDonald's USA, LLC and McDonald's Corporation
pending_cases.status: remanded by 7th Cir.; back at district court

pending_cases.caption: Crawford et al. v. McDonald's USA, LLC
pending_cases.type: race discrimination by 77 former Black franchisees; bad faith breach, fraudulent inducement, federal civil rights claims; related McPherson Complaint
pending_cases.status: second amended complaints; motions to dismiss pending

pending_cases.caption: Kytch, Inc. v. McDonald's Corporation
pending_cases.type: false advertising / trade libel / tortious interference re ice cream machine diagnostic device
pending_cases.status: transferred to N.D. Cal.; motion to dismiss largely denied

pending_cases.caption: Michell v. McDonald's Corporation et al.
pending_cases.type: Hispanic franchisee discrimination + Connecticut Franchise Act + retaliation; counterclaim for declaratory judgment of franchisee breach

pending_cases.caption: Williams v. McDonald's USA, LLC
pending_cases.type: Quarter Pounder E. coli class action; consumer fraud, negligence, unjust enrichment

pending_cases.caption: Le et al. v. McDonald's Corporation
McDonald's Corporation v. Pestonjee
pending_cases.court: Commercial High Court, Colombo, Sri Lanka

concluded_cases_pattern.value: Multiple high-dollar settlement-by-buyout outcomes, including: Lentini (NJ) $22M for 6 restaurants (age discrimination); Washington (OH) $33.5M for 13 restaurants (race discrimination); Byrd (IL) $6.5M for 4 restaurants (race discrimination); Tavarua (CA) $15.6M for 8 franchises (ROFR dispute); AA&S Puerto Rico $15.78M for 23 franchises (Law 75); Quijano Puerto Rico $6.32M for 10 franchises (Law 75); Easterbrook SEC settlement (no monetary penalty); McDonald's Channel (CA) $150,000; Bramante Quebec CAD $1.44M; PFAS Clark $145,000; Snow copyright UK $650,000; Kim cybersecurity $10,000; PR Italy purchase EUR 1.67M; Bledsoe drink upcharge $2,500; Knowles Happy Meal upcharge $35,000; Howe Mozzarella sticks $32,500; Gohari digital menu pricing $180,000; Ochoa CA labor $3.75M.

item_18_public_figure_flag.value: None — McDonald's does not use any public figure to promote its franchise

pro_forma_basis.value: 11,332 independent franchisee traditional restaurants open ≥1 year (4% royalty cohort, excludes McOpCo, Satellites, restaurants that changed owners in 2024)

item_19_performance_summary.internal_inconsistency: Pro-forma is based on 11,332 restaurants, but the percentile sentence below the table refers to 11,322 — 10-restaurant discrepancy in the same item.

guaranty_to_franchisor_directly.value: Not directly surfaced — financial statements stand on their own; McDonald's Corporation parent does not provide a written guaranty of the franchisor in this FDD

parent_ip_royalty_rate_pct.notes: 2% of all company-owned and franchised restaurant sales paid to McDonald's Corporation under IP license; royalty expense $1,069.4M (2024)

intercompany_payables_to_parent_dec31_20.notes: $1.5B + $0.9B intercompany lines of credit at 12-month swap + 1%; both fully drawn at Dec 31 2024 and 2023

subsequent_event.value: On February 17, 2025, the $2.4B of payable arrangements with McDonald's Corporation matured and were converted to equity; no longer represents an obligation for the Company

tax_examination_window.value: With few exceptions, no longer subject to U.S. federal, state, and local income tax examinations for years before 2009

depreciation_useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: lesser of useful life or lease term

long_lived_asset_impairment_grouping.value: Field office level (not individual restaurant); annual fourth quarter test

gross_sales_credit_sale_timing.value: Each charge or credit sale treated as a sale at the FULL price in the month it is made, regardless of when payment is received

gross_sales_includes_orders_filled_elsew.value: Gross Sales includes amounts of all orders taken or received at the Restaurant whether filled from the Restaurant or elsewhere

delinquency_interest_rate_pct.notes: 15% per annum, monthly compounded, or highest rate allowed by law if greater. Applies to all amounts owed to McDonald's under the Franchise Agreement. The Item 10 BoA loan program rate (Term SOFR + adjustment + 3%, APR 7.42% as of 3/17/2025) is a separate instrument applicable only to the BoA-guaranteed loan program. The Exhibit N Unlimited Guaranty Section 2 enforcement rate (18% per annum or floating Prime + 4%, capped at usury max) is a third instrument applicable only to guarantor enforcement actions.

guarantor_enforcement_interest_rate.value: 18% per annum or, if higher, the Lender's Prime Rate plus 4% (capped by maximum permitted under applicable law)
guarantor_enforcement_interest_rate.notes: Applies to amounts recoverable under the Unlimited Guaranty (Annex I-1 of Exhibit N) for BoA loan-program guarantor enforcement actions, separate from the FA Section 8(c) 15% rate and the Item 10 SOFR-based loan rate

consolidation_waiver.notes: Direct quote: 'NEITHER THE GUARANTOR NOR THE LENDER WILL SEEK TO CONSOLIDATE ANY SUCH ACTION, IN WHICH A JURY TRIAL HAS BEEN WAIVED, WITH ANY OTHER ACTION IN WHICH A JURY TRIAL CANNOT BE OR HAS NOT BEEN WAIVED.' Co-located in the same paragraph as the jury trial waiver. Per 17_conflict_adjudication.md, this was extracted by the prior production run and was the one substantive missing-fact regression in the shadow run.

attorneys_fees_recovery.value: FA Section 23: McDonald's recovers reasonable attorneys' fees plus court costs and expenses of litigation

indemnification_obligation.value: FA Section 24: Broad franchisee indemnity covering judgments, settlements, penalties, attorneys' fees, court costs and expenses; franchisee defends McDonald's at McDonald's election

fmv_purchase_option_on_termination.value: FA Section 20(b)/(c): 30-day FMV purchase option after breach termination + 30-day no-removal freeze; pre-expiration 60-day no-removal window plus FMV purchase option on expiration/eminent domain — no payment for intangibles

rofr_mechanics.value: FA Section 15(c): 20-day prior written notice with proposed purchaser identity and offer terms; McDonald's has 10 days to elect to match; continuing first option on subsequent offers

in_term_noncompete_includes_landlord.value: FA Section 11(a): in-term non-compete extends to 'becoming a landlord for' any similar restaurant business; <2% public-company stock exception

operating_hours_floor.value: FA Section 12(g): 7 days/week, 7:00 a.m.–11:00 p.m. minimum, or other hours as McDonald's may prescribe

material_breach_judgment_threshold_usd.notes: Judgments or liens > $5,000 unsatisfied/unbonded > 30 days = material breach

public_conduct_political_carveout.value: FA Section 18(o) carves out 'legitimate political activity (including testifying, lobbying, or otherwise attempting to influence legislation)'

transferor_continuing_liability.value: FA Section 15(d): transferring franchisee remains personally liable for all affirmative obligations for the full term (or shorter at McDonald's sole discretion); royalty resets automatically to then-prevailing rate

insurance_minimums.carrier_rating_min: A.M. Best Financial Size Category ≥ IX, Policyholders Rating A+ or A
insurance_minimums.additional_insureds: McDonald's and any party McDonald's designates

cpa_audit_certification_obligation.value: FA Section 10: annual P&L and balance sheet within 90 days of fiscal year close, GAAP, certifiable by CPA at McDonald's request, with franchisee bearing CPA consultation cost; 2% Gross Sales understatement audit-cost shift

daily_and_monthly_reporting_cadence.value: FA Section 10: daily receipts statement by 11:00 a.m. CST first business day of each month; monthly operating statement and statistical report by 25th; 3-year retention

entity_assignment_constraint.value: FA Section 15(b): assignment to wholly-owned controlled corporation only; corporate name may not include McDonald's marks

key_exhibits: B/C/D — Three franchise agreements (Traditional, Satellite, Walmart)
G — Operator's Lease (with internal landlord/oil/co-brand/excess-property addenda)
N — BoA loan documents + Operator Assistance Program Agreement
T — State addenda (CA, HI, MD, MN, ND, WA + WA AOD)
unresolveds: Notes to financial statements only sampled (page 63+) — full notes not enumerated in this canonical.
Full Operator's Lease and franchise agreement clauses not extracted line-by-line; only Item 17 cross-reference table.
Exhibit R and Exhibit S contents are extracted by structure (counts, presence) but full row-level enumeration not reproduced here.
BoA loan loss/default rates and franchisee uptake of the guarantee program not disclosed.

unresolveds.description: BoA guarantee-program loan loss/default rates and franchisee uptake of the BoA loan program are not disclosed in the FDD. Item 10 describes terms and pricing but provides no visibility into the realized default or utilization experience of franchisees using the program.
unresolveds.source: Item 10 (page 30); carried forward from runs/mcdonalds-2025-merged U-4

contradictions: Item 19 pro-forma basis says 11,332 restaurants but immediate post-table sentence says 11,322 (10-restaurant gap).
Item 1 says 'about 95% franchised / 5% McOpCo' and the financial-statement note table reports 12,886 franchised vs Item 20 Table 1 reporting 12,887 — 1-restaurant gap.
Item 7 disclosed traditional total range of $1.471M–$2.728M is contradicted by Item 7 Note 11 disclosure that 9 of 31 2024 McOpCo refranchise transactions exceeded the high end by up to $2,035,816.
Item 19 pro-forma uses the 4% (legacy) royalty cohort while post-2024 new entrants pay 5% — disclosed pro-forma understates royalty drag for new franchisees by 1 percentage point of Gross Sales.

contradictions.description: Item 19 pro forma is derived from a restaurant cohort whose royalty during the covered period was 4% of Gross Sales. As of January 1, 2024, new restaurants, McOpCo-sale purchases, and franchisor ROFR resales pay 5%. The pro forma therefore understates the royalty burden for new franchisees by 1 percentage point of Gross Sales — at $3.4M sales, roughly $34,000 less OIBO than the table presents.

Item 20 Table 1 reports 12,887 franchised outlets at year-end 2024. Exhibit A Nature of Business note reports 12,886 franchised outlets at year-end 2024. One-outlet gap. Both sources are from the same filing.

hawaii.focus: Item 17 anti-waiver language + HI filing disclosure

maryland.focus: Release exclusion for MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law; MD venue option; 3-year limitations period

minnesota.focus: Minn. Stat. 80C.14 termination notice/cure (90d/60d cure, 180d non-renewal), reasonable transfer consent, trademark defense

north_dakota.focus: Non-compete generally unenforceable; ND law governs ND Franchise Investment Law claims

washington.focus: RCW 19.100.180 / WA FIPA supremacy; separate AOD removes no-hire/no-poach provisions

item21_financials_depth_v2.dividend_policy: 100% upstream of net income to parent each year
item21_financials_depth_v2.subsequent_event: $2.4B parent payable converted to equity on 2025-02-17

item1_structural_depth_v2.source: Exhibit A Nature of Business note (page 63)

merge_v2_meta.merge_basis: Old as base (richer per-leaf provenance envelope, deeper Exhibit B clause walk). New v2 contributions: state_addenda_overrides structured family + override_family matrix, Item 21 lease/tax/restructuring depth, Item 1 formation asset transfer, Wisconsin-addendum-absence flag, Washington AOD as canonical entry, contradictions C-05/C-06.
merge_v2_meta.value_conflicts: none — every numeric field matched between old and new v2 in B1 spot-check (28 fields)
merge_v2_meta.note: Old contradictions/unresolveds preserved verbatim. Additive only.
